## Model.IOptionsWithPreferred interface

Collection of options (objects with IDs) with a preferred selection. Use when options are objects containing IDs plus additional metadata.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IOptionsWithPreferred<TOption extends IHasId<TId>, TId extends string> 
```
